    n = len(nums)

    for p in range(1, n-2):

        for q in range(p+1, n-1):

            # Check first part: 0 to p is strictly increasing

            first_ok = True

            for i in range(p):

                if nums[i] >= nums[i+1]:

                    first_ok = False

                    break

            if not first_ok:

            # Check second part: p to q is strictly decreasing

            second_ok = True

            for i in range(p, q):

                if nums[i] <= nums[i+1]:

                    second_ok = False

                    break

            if not second_ok:

                continue

            # Check third part: q to end is strictly increasing

            third_ok = True

            for i in range(q, n-1):

                if nums[i] >= nums[i+1]:

                    third_ok = False

                    break

            if third_ok:

                return True

    return False
